mpvik414btjoc.fullNotes:
Less is more - 
Even getting fb more info or indicators etc. is not necessary. Stick to what you know
Risk mgmt (R) > win %
Get data and see what it shows you
When developing keep size constant, advanced should adjust sizing 
4/5 key mechanical rules
- if long but losing , should we add ? - look for reasons to short to avoid confirmation bias
- let the market reflect the macro/news rather than assuming it will
-cuttings winning too early. 
Don’t look at P&L; change candle colors; trade price
- when trading write down thought process
- he often does not wait for take profit and exits earlier coz now close to it, the R is different. It’s ok to sell!
